trigger.description: VERBATIM operator quote — LOCAL ONLY, redacted before any export (FR-8)

solution.description: Generalized fix; the GENERALITY gate (FR-3) strips project-specifics before this leaves

line_hint.description: CONTEXTUAL TEXT SNIPPET for fuzzy/patch-context match — NEVER integer coordinates (prd.md §9 FR-1)

confirmed.description: false = QUARANTINED (classifier-captured, awaiting operator confirm at distill, FR-2)

run_id.description: GENOME ADMISSION BACKLINK (bd-uze). The compose run_id active when this clew was captured (LOA_COMPOSE_RUN_ID), or null for an ambient capture outside a governed run. A clew is admissible to the construct's genome ONLY if run_id is non-null AND compose-verify-run returns `valid_run` for it; otherwise it is quarantined to SUSPECTS.jsonl. This is the incorruptible-by-roleplay invariant: a correction made outside a real run teaches nothing.

distilled_at.description: Idempotency stamp — non-null = already reduced, skip on re-run

distill_status.description: Lifecycle. pending→proposed (teaching PR drafted)→distilled (operator-merged + genome-admitted). suspect = failed genome admission (no/invalid run_id), quarantined to SUSPECTS.jsonl. The rejected_* / skipped_* states are generality/redaction gate outcomes.

genome_hash.description: GENOME LINK (bd-uze). For a distilled clew, the genome_hash this clew PRODUCED — its link in the construct's genome-hash-chain, computed by genome-chain.py as sha256(jcs({parent, entry})). The chain head is mirrored to the construct.yaml genome_hash; the genome-integrity eval recomputes the whole chain from these entries. Present only on distill_status=distilled entries.

genome_seq.description: GENOME CHAIN INDEX (bd-uze). The 1-based distillation order = the depth this clew produced. Stamped at admission; the genome-integrity verifier orders the chain by genome_seq (AUTHORITATIVE), never by the mutable distilled_at timestamp (which clock-skew / same-second ties could reorder). Present only on distill_status=distilled entries.

proposed_pr.description: The teaching-PR URL recorded by --mark-proposed / --mark-distilled. (Added to the schema to close the pre-existing second-mutation-path drift: the in-place distill rewrite wrote this field while validation only ran on append — the crucible validation-coverage clew. --mark-distilled now re-validates the rewritten entry against this schema.)
